artPrompt: A monstrous shark rogue in a rumpled suit looming half-out of dark lagoon water beside a flooded back-room dock, rows of teeth bared in a businesslike grin, one fin sliding a treasure coin across a soaked plank toward an unseen debtor. A single amber lamp glints off its wet hide and predatory eye, the rest sinking into oily black water. Rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: Loan Shark of the Lagoon
text:
When Loan Shark of the Lagoon enters the battlefield, target opponent creates a Treasure token and you create a Favor token. The vig is murder.
Loan Shark of the Lagoon gets +1/+0 for each Favor token you control.
flavorText: The interest swims in circles, and it is always hungry.
